testcase.name: approveDraftTimesheet_shouldThrowBadRequestException

testcase.name: submitTimesheet_withNoEntries_shouldThrowBadRequestException

testcase.name: fullWorkflow_shouldWorkCorrectly
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into timesheets (consultant_id, locked, manager_id, status, submitted_at, week_end, week_start, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into audit_log_entries (action, actor_employee_id, details, occurred_at, timesheet_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
